title: Leaving on the 15th Spring
original_title: 旅立ちの島唄～十五の春～
overview: Junior high school student Yuna lives with her father Toshiharu. Her mother Akemi moved to Naha when her older sister entered high school, and Yuna is worried about her father's life after she leaves.
